name: T-Honk You Goose
insideText: I can't say it loud enough... T-HONK YOU!

name: Bonhomme Breakdance
insideText: Time to bust out the winter moves. Wishing you the happiest of birthdays!

name: Maple Syrup IV
insideText: Pumping you full of the good stuff. Get well soon, eh?

name: The Beaver Architect
insideText: All that hard work finally paid off. A dam good job! Congratulations!

name: The Apologetic Standoff
insideText: I insist, you first. No, after you! Sorry about the kerfuffle. Let's make up.

name: Zamboni Drive-Thru
insideText: Whatever you're driving today, make sure you fuel up. Coffee's on me.

name: Majestic Mountie Moose
insideText: Riding high on your success! Massive congratulations on a truly majestic achievement.

name: Curling Stone Walk
insideText: Time to slow down and just glide. Have a wonderful, relaxing retirement.

name: Skookum Thumbs-Up
insideText: You've got this. It's gonna be a totally skookum day!

name: The Literal Bunny Hug
insideText: Sending you a massive bunny hug to survive the cold. Stay warm out there!
